overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Last of Us showing Joel wading through a flooded, overgrown urban area toward the Massachusetts State House, ascending the steps to explore the terrace, and entering the building to reveal a grand interior rotunda with an ornate stained glass dome.

events.description: exits the flooded water onto dry stone ground near the building

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water in a flooded urban area, moving toward the Massachusetts State House

notable_agents.action: companion standing in shallow water near the building entrance, waiting

entered.detail: circular stone pavilion with columns, partially submerged in water
large brick building with tall columns and golden dome, covered in ivy
shallow water covering the ground with lily pads and tall grass
white statue in the distance among the reeds
weathered wooden barrier partially submerged in water

segments.scene_description: Joel wades through a flooded urban park area with a stone gazebo visible to the left. The Massachusetts State House looms ahead across the water, surrounded by overgrown vegetation. A companion waits near the shore as Joel approaches the dry ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic building entrance with grand stone staircase

events.description: passes through the wrought iron gate beneath the Massachusetts State House sign

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone steps toward the State House entrance, passing through the iron gate

notable_agents.action: companion following closely up the stairs and through the gate

entered.detail: ornate black metal gate with stone pillars marking the entrance
arched sign with gold lettering above the entrance
large decorative stone planters flanking the stairs
wide granite steps leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Joel exits the water and ascends the grand stone steps of the Massachusetts State House, passing through an ornate wrought iron gate. The building's brick facade and tall columns dominate the view as he climbs toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlooking flooded city park

events.description: turns left along the building terrace revealing panoramic city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace path, pausing to look out at the overgrown cityscape and distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: following along the terrace and stopping to look at the view

entered.detail: distant modern skyscrapers and buildings visible through the haze
vintage black iron lampposts along the terrace edge
tall pointed steeple rising above the trees in the distance
black metal railing along the terrace edge overlooking the park

segments.scene_description: Joel turns along the side terrace of the State House, revealing a sweeping view of the flooded city park below and the distant skyline. Vintage street lamps line the path as he walks past ivy-covered walls, with skyscrapers visible through the morning haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand rotunda with ornate stained glass dome

events.description: enters the Massachusetts State House interior from the terrace
looks upward at the intricate stained glass dome ceiling

agents.ego_description: standing in the rotunda, looking up at the domed ceiling and turning to observe the grand interior architecture

entered.detail: elaborate circular glass ceiling with green and gold patterns, surrounded by smaller circular windows
curved second-floor walkway with ornate stone railings
tall arched doorways and openings along the rotunda walls
massive fluted pillars supporting the balcony and ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: Inside the Massachusetts State House, Joel stands in a grand rotunda beneath an elaborate stained glass dome. Light filters through the colored glass onto the marble floors as he looks up at the intricate ceiling architecture and surrounding balconies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a flooded, overgrown urban park into the grand, sheltered interior of the Massachusetts State House. It begins with Joel wading through shallow water past a stone gazebo, moving toward the looming brick facade of the State House as he reaches dry ground. As he exits the water, the camera ascends the grand stone steps and passes through an ornate wrought iron gate, climbing toward the building's towering columns. The scene then shifts to a side terrace, where the view expands to reveal a sweeping panorama of the flooded city and a distant skyline shrouded in morning haze. Finally, the camera follows Joel inside to a grand rotunda, where the open air is replaced by a vast interior featuring marble floors and an elaborate stained glass dome filtering colored light from above.
